languages.text: "Я готов{mf||а} аргументированно обосновать тебе, почему ты должен пойти на это".
"I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."
languages.original_text: "Я готов{mf||а} аргументированно обосновать тебе, почему ты должен пойти на это".

traits.locale_text: "I am prepared to give you a reasoned argument as to why you should agree to this."
"I am prepared to give you a reasoned argument as to why you should agree to this."
"I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."
"I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."
"I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."
"I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

languages.text: "Ich werde Euch ein rationales Argument liefern, warum Ihr das Angebot annehmen solltet."
languages.original_text: "I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

traits.locale_text: "Ich werde Euch ein rationales Argument liefern, warum Ihr das Angebot annehmen solltet."

languages.text: « J'ai préparé des arguments rationnels qui vous feront peut-être changer d'avis. »
languages.original_text: "I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

traits.locale_text: « J'ai préparé des arguments rationnels qui vous feront peut-être changer d'avis. »

languages.text: «Estoy dispuest{mf|o|a} a presentar un argumento racional para que acepte hacerlo».
languages.original_text: "I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

traits.locale_text: «Estoy dispuest{mf|o|a} a presentar un argumento racional para que acepte hacerlo».

languages.text: "Buna neden razı olman gerektiği konusunda sana rasyonel bir argüman sunacağım."
languages.original_text: "I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

traits.locale_text: "Buna neden razı olman gerektiği konusunda sana rasyonel bir argüman sunacağım."

languages.text: “我可以给你一个合理的解释，告诉你为什么该答应。”
languages.original_text: "I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

traits.locale_text: “我可以给你一个合理的解释，告诉你为什么该答应。”

languages.text: 「君がこれに同意すべき理由を、理性的な論拠をもって示す用意がある」
languages.original_text: "I am prepared to give you a rational argument as to why you should agree to this."

traits.locale_text: 「君がこれに同意すべき理由を、理性的な論拠をもって示す用意がある」
